chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-424 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on M.A. 2110/2022 For orders on office objection For orders on M.A. 2111/2022 For hearing of main case 19.05.2022 This petition suffers from laches as it involves the recruitment policy of 2013. The petitioner’s counsel was put on notice on the last date but he failed to respond today in fact he is called absent. Dismissed for non- prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
